title: Planning Payload Surface Classification
goal: Implement #462 by classifying planning payload surfaces before any shrinking, extraction, or config-gating work.
non_goals: Do not remove or move planning payload in this slice unless the change is trivial and directly justified by classification.
Do not redefine planning core beyond the classification needed for #461 follow-up slices.

intent.outcome: Every planning payload doc, template, skill, helper, installed surface, README claim, and packaging include has a compact classification and owner rationale.
intent.constraints: Keep classification compact and useful for deciding the smallest safe default planning install.
intent.latitude: Choose the lowest-residue artifact shape that lets #463-#466 proceed without redoing inventory.
intent.escalation: Escalate if classification would require removing payload or changing install behavior before the inventory is reviewed.

execution.next_step: Inventory packages/planning/bootstrap, packages/planning/skills, planning-installed docs, README claims, and pyproject package-data includes.
execution.proof: planning package tests, ruff, proof selector, and planning doctor

invariants: Classification must make future default-footprint reduction cheaper.
Do not add another first-contact surface unless it replaces or compresses an existing one.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: #461: make Agentic Planning smaller by default and clearer by boundary.

required_continuation.required follow-on detail: #463-#466 depend on the classification produced by #462.
required_continuation.activation trigger: after #462 closeout, promote the next #461 child based on classification results

parent_lane.title: Reclassify planning payload into core, optional extensions, and extraction candidates

iterative_follow_through.intentionally deferred: default install shrink, config gating, extraction boundaries, and capability map refresh

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Classify planning payload surfaces by core, optional, on-demand, dev-only, and extraction status.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Classify before deleting, moving, or splitting payload.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Classification artifact format and exact owner-rationale wording.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: Classification implies immediate removal of a surface that may still be needed for compatibility.

context_budget.live working set: state, this execplan, #461/#462, packages/planning/bootstrap, packages/planning/skills, planning README, pyproject package-data, and installer payload lists
context_budget.recoverable later: the archived previous lane and prior product-shape reviews
context_budget.externalize before shift: record classification artifact path and summary in execution_summary
context_budget.tiny resumability note: Next active issue is #462 planning payload classification.
context_budget.context-shift triggers: Before changing default install behavior or deleting payload.

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Make the package streamlined, lightweight, frictionless, cheap, modular, and small while preserving leverage.
system_intent_alignment.slice shaping bias: Classify and compress future work; avoid capability expansion.
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: Does the classification make #463-#466 cheaper and less ambiguous?

active_milestone.scope: Keep this execution thread bounded to classification and preparation for the next #461 child.

immediate_next_action: Choose or add the compact classification artifact and tests needed for #462 acceptance.
invariants: Preserve the planning contract and keep the work bounded to this plan.
validation_commands: cd packages/planning && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py -q
cd packages/planning && uv run ruff check .
uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
completion_criteria: Every planning payload surface has a classification and owner rationale.
Classification identifies the smallest safe default planning install.
Classification names surfaces that should become optional, on-demand, dev-only, or extraction candidates.

closure_check.reopen trigger: planning payload shrink starts without complete classification

drift_log: 2026-04-27: Promoted after the previous intent-loop lane completed.
